'''bapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yawnfully|yawnfully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yawnfully|yawnfully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bapate|bapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bapatesher|bapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bapatesherĂ«m|bapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bapatero|bapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bapateshĂ«|bapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bapateshĂ«m|bapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibapatero|gokibapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibapateshĂ«|gokibapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibapateshĂ«m|gokibapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobapankerom|gobapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobapankeshĂ«|gobapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobapankeshĂ«m|gobapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobapankeya|gobapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bapaterom|bapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bapatemu|bapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bapateya|bapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibapaterom|gokibapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibapatemu|gokibapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibapateya|gokibapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bapapate|bapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bapapatesher|bapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bapapatesherĂ«m|bapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bapapatero|bapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bapapateshĂ«|bapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bapapateshĂ«m|bapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibapapatero|gokibapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibapapateshĂ«|gokibapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibapapateshĂ«m|gokibapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobapapankerom|gobapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobapapankeshĂ«|gobapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobapapankeshĂ«m|gobapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobapapankeya|gobapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bapapaterom|bapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bapapatemu|bapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bapapateya|bapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibapapaterom|gokibapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibapapatemu|gokibapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibapapateya|gokibapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠpĂŠte|bĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠpĂŠtesher|bĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠpĂŠtero|bĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠpĂŠtero|gokibĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠpĂŠterom|bĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠpĂŠtemu|bĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠpĂŠteya|bĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠpĂŠterom|gokibĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠpĂŠteya|gokibĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafpafte|bafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafpaftesher|bafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafpaftesherĂ«m|bafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafpaftero|bafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafpafteshĂ«|bafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafpafteshĂ«m|bafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafpaftero|gokibafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafpafteshĂ«|gokibafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafpafteshĂ«m|gokibafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafpafnkerom|gobafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafpafnkeshĂ«|gobafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafpafnkeshĂ«m|gobafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafpafnkeya|gobafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafpafterom|bafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafpaftemu|bafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafpafteya|bafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafpafterom|gokibafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafpaftemu|gokibafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafpafteya|gokibafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
